chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 981 of 2012 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 03.09.2019 None present for petitioner Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl.A.G. 1. By means of this petition, the petitioner is seeking appointment in lower grade posts i.e. Naib Qasid / Chowkidar in the Education Department on the ground that his wife had donated a plot for the construction of building of Government Girls Primary School free of cost. 2. Learned Counsel for the petitioner is absent. 3. This issue has already been decided by Honourable Supreme Court in the case of Government of Sindh and others v. Loung Khan Rajper etc (Civil Appeals Nos.19-K to 50-K of 2015) that on the basis of donation of the plot a person cannot be appointed on any post ignoring the merits. We have also decided this issue on the same line in previous petitions bearing C.Ps No.D-968 and 1274 of 2012 on 18.10.2017. 4. In view of above, this petition is dismissed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
